ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight 1234
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

Thank you for booking with XYZ Airlines. Your flight itinerary is confirmed as follows:

Flight Number: XYZ1234
Departure: New York (JFK) – 15:30, 25 June 2024
Arrival: Los Angeles (LAX) – 18:45, 25 June 2024
Date: 25 June 2024

Seat: 12A
Class: Economy

Please find your e-boarding pass attached. If you need to make any changes, you can manage your booking at <URL>.

We look forward to serving you. If you have any questions, feel free to contact us.

Best regards,
XYZ Airlines Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT – Immediate Action Required for Your Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear John Doe,

This is an urgent notification from the Human Resources Department regarding your payroll processing. Due to recent system updates, we require you to confirm your personal and banking details to ensure your salary is deposited correctly.

Please click the secure link below and submit the required information within 24 hours:

<URL>

Failure to complete this verification will result in a temporary hold on your payroll for the upcoming cycle. This measure is in place to comply with new financial regulations and protect your account from unauthorized access.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
HR Manager – Payroll Team
XYZ Corporation
